behavior_summary: When an actor triggers the boat's 'U8P_BOAT::look' (examine) event, the script configures presentation/processing state for the boat and announces a short label for the boat to the viewer.

Specifically, the script writes a process/info value (0x0208) and issues a 'process exclude' action to adjust how the object is handled, then constructs the literal string "boat " and invokes Item::bark to display/emit that label for the boat's process/context.
Temporary resources (the constructed string) are freed after the call, and the script then completes (suspends/returns).
notable_control_flow: Event-driven: U8P_BOAT::look runs in response to the 'U8P_BOAT::look' (examine) event.
Pre-display guard: the script sets info (0x0208) and applies 'process exclude' before calling Item::bark, indicating a deliberate ordering to avoid re-entrancy or to alter presentation.

Single outward interaction: after preparing state, the function makes one external interaction (Item::bark) and then cleans up and returns; there are no loops or complex branches in the canonical flow.
open_questions: Exact semantic meaning of the info value 0x0208 (what presentation or processing bits it encodes) — inferred but not certain.
Precise identity/meaning of the parameter at [BP+06] (appears to be the item/process PID or object pointer passed to Item::bark).
The role of the 'implies' / pop sequence observed after the Item::bark return — whether it affects game state or is merely a control-flow artifact.
Whether 'process exclude' prevents only re-entrancy for this call or also alters other engine processing for the object.

main_function.name: U8P_BOAT::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the item's examine/U8P_BOAT::look event: prepare the object's presentation state and announce its short label to the viewer.
entry_conditions: Event 0 — player/actor 'looks at' or examines the boat (entering the item's U8P_BOAT::look trigger).

function_map.name: U8P_BOAT::look
function_map.role: Process handler for the boat's 'U8P_BOAT::look' (examine) event; configures info/processing flags and invokes Item::bark to show the item's label.

function_map.name: Item::bark
function_map.role: Engine/item routine used to display/emit a short text label or message for an item/process. Called by U8P_BOAT::look with the string "boat " and the boat's process/context.

function_map.name: U8P_BOAT::set info
function_map.role: Engine opcode used to write an info/flag value (here 0x0208) to a process/object to adjust presentation/processing.

function_map.name: U8P_BOAT::process exclude
function_map.role: Engine opcode used to exclude or change how a process/object is further processed (likely to prevent recursion or modify visibility); invoked after set info.

external_calls.purpose: Display or announce the boat's short label string ("boat ") to the target process/viewer (the BP+06 context passed).
Write the info value 0x0208 to the object/process to configure presentation/processing before announcing the label.
Modify the object's processing state right after setting info, likely to avoid re-entrancy or further processing during the display operation.
Free the temporary string buffer constructed for the label after Item::bark returns.

writes.name: process info (0x0208)
writes.likely_effect: Configure how the object presents information or is processed by the engine (applied before calling Item::bark).

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: When an actor triggers the boat's 'U8P_BOAT::look' (examine) event, the script configures presentation/processing state for the boat and announces a short label for the boat to the viewer.
